author: doll-agent
content: FftPlanND landed in ferray-fft/src/plan.rs and is re-exported from the crate root alongside FftPlan. 7 new unit tests + 1 doctest cover construction, parity with fftn, round-trip, axis-subset, shape mismatch, validation rejection, and the Arc-eq check against the global cache. cargo test -p ferray-fft is green; clippy -- -D warnings is clean.
